title: micranthes ferruginea
intro: Micranthes ferruginea, also known as Rusty Cinquefoil, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Micranthes ferruginea include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
